Top Pickleball Podcasts for Players & Fans

By Billy Walters • 5/11/2024
pickleball-101

Pickleball podcasts have become hugely popular in recent years. Thousands of players and fans are now listening. They aim to help seasoned players improve and keep enthusiasts informed on trends.

The McGuffin Show: The #1 Pickleball Podcast

The McGuffin Show is a top-notch podcast in the pickleball world. It’s hosted by the famous pickleball player, Tyson McGuffin. The show has attracted many listeners and is now a trusted source for players at all levels. It has more than 50 episodes where you can learn a lot about pickleball.

Tyson McGuffin and his co-host, Kyle McKenzie, create a fun and insightful podcast together. They share useful tips and tricks for both new and experienced players. Their great friendship is clear in every episode, making it fun to listen to.

“The McGuffin Show helped me a lot in my pickleball journey. Tyson and Kyle really know their stuff and love talking about pickleball. I would recommend this podcast to anyone who loves the sport.”

-Anonymous testimonial

The McGuffin Show often interviews top pickleball players and experts. These interviews give you a peek into the lives of successful pickleball players. They also talk about different topics like tournament highlights and equipment reviews. It’s a show that’s both informative and fun.

Are you looking to step up your pickleball game? Want to keep up with the latest pickleball news? Or maybe you just like good, interesting talks? Make sure to check out The McGuffin Show. With tons of great info and the fun times with Tyson McGuffin and Kyle McKenzie, this podcast is leading the way in pickleball podcasts.

Stay tuned for insights on other popular pickleball podcasts in Section 3!

Image: The McGuffin Show logo

It Feels Right with Rob & Stone: A Popular Pickleball Podcast

Want a pickleball podcast that looks at the sport in a new way? It Feels Right with Rob & Stone is for you. It’s run by pros Adam Stone and Rob Nunnery. They give an insider’s view on pro tours, player thoughts, and fun talks about pickleball.

This podcast is special because of Adam and Rob. They’re both expert pickleball players with a lot of love for the game. In each episode, they talk about their own experiences, give tips, and share the latest pickleball updates.

What makes it even better is how well Adam and Rob get along. Their natural connection makes the talks fun and interesting. They might be talking about tournament results, top strategies, or speaking with other top players. But their love for pickleball always shines.

Every It Feels Right with Rob & Stone show is full of cool stuff for pickleball lovers. They cover everything from pro challenges to community fun. Their topics are solid for both players and fans of the game.

Looking for a great pickleball podcast that’s both fun and smart? It Feels Right with Rob & Stone is top-notch. Adam and Rob’s deep knowledge and fun talks make it a winner for any pickleball fan.

Inside Major League Pickleball: A Must-Listen for MLP Fans

Are you a big Major League Pickleball (MLP) fan? Then don’t miss the Inside Major League Pickleball podcast. Tyson Apostol, Michelle McMahon, and Casey Patterson host it. It’s full of deep talks, tournament reviews, and inside looks at the pro pickleball scene.

If you want to keep up with the MLP or get tips from the best, this podcast has it all. Especially after the MLP and the PPA joined forces, it’s the go-to for behind-the-scenes stuff and what’s happening today.

Tyson Apostol talks as a former pro and Survivor champion. Michelle McMahon chats with top players. And Casey Patterson shares his tales from the court.

“Inside Major League Pickleball shows the sport like never before, with inside takes on challenges, wins, and moments you won’t forget. Our love for pickleball shines through every week in exciting, informative episodes. Come with us as we explore Major League Pickleball!” – Tyson Apostol

Each Inside Major League Pickleball episode covers the best games, news, and interviews. It’s a must for anyone who loves pickleball, whether you play, watch, or are just curious.

To keep up with Major League Pickleball, subscribe to the podcast right now. Get ready for fun, learning, and a lot of pickleball with Tyson, Michelle, and Casey.

Upcoming Episodes

Episode Title Guest
1 Unveiling the New MLP Tournament Format Adam Stone
2 Inside the Life of a Professional Pickleball Player Lucy Kovalova
3 The Art of Mental Resilience on the Court Sarah Ansboury
4 MLP Player Spotlight: Ben Johns Ben Johns

Don’t miss the new episodes and catch up on the old ones. Subscribe to the Inside Major League Pickleball podcast. Be part of the MLP community and discover more about the game we love.

The Pickleball Studio Podcast: Conversational Insights on Pickleball

The Pickleball Studio Podcast is a top pick for pickleball fans. Hosted by Chris Olson and Will Chaing, it’s packed with insights and tips. They chat like friends, making each episode both informative and fun.

Every episode covers topics important to the pickleball crowd. They talk about strategies, tournaments, and personal stories. They even host experts in the field for in-depth discussions. This broad approach caters to players at any level.

The podcast’s charm lies in its casual, friendly tone. Chris and Will’s banter feels like you’re eavesdropping on a chat between buddies. It makes learning about pickleball a joy, no matter your skill.

The show goes beyond player tips and tourney news. Chris and Will dive into the whole pickleball scene. They cover what’s new, what’s trending, and where the sport’s heading. It’s a one-stop shop for all things pickleball.

“The Pickleball Studio Podcast is my go-to for staying in the loop. Chris and Will are so knowledgeable yet approachable. I feel like I’m part of their conversation, not just listening. Highly recommended!” – Sarah, pickleball player

It doesn’t matter if you’re just getting into pickleball or a seasoned pro. The Pickleball Studio Podcast is a must-listen. It keeps you updated, helps you play better, and lets you connect with the pickleball world.

Additional Resources

  • Check out The Pickleball Studio Podcast’s website for more information about their episodes and guests.
  • Follow Chris Olson and Will Chaing on social media for updates and behind-the-scenes content.
  • Subscribe to The Pickleball Studio Podcast on your favorite podcast platform to never miss an episode.

Dinking Around with Eddie and Webby: Fun and Entertainment for Pickleball Enthusiasts

Dinking Around with Eddie and Webby is a top podcast with a mix of fun and pickleball. Eddie and Webby, known for their humor, host this podcast. It’s a great listen, keeping you entertained throughout.

They explore everything about pickleball with their unique take. From the latest trends to product reviews, their shows are both fun and informative. You’ll enjoy the stories they share from their playtime and life.

The show also features chats with well-known figures in pickleball. Top players and experts join in, sharing their wisdom. These talks give a peek into the lively world of pickleball.

But it’s not all serious. Eddie and Webby’s energy is contagious, making every episode lively. Their jokes and stories are sure to keep you smiling. Plus, you’ll learn more about pickleball in a fun way.

If you love pickleball and want a podcast that’s both fun and educational, check this out. Listen to the latest episodes for a great time!

Why You Should Listen to Dinking Around with Eddie and Webby:

  • Unique blend of fun, entertainment, and pickleball insights
  • Quirky and humorous perspectives on pickleball culture
  • Interviews with top players and industry experts
  • Lively banter and engaging chemistry between Eddie and Webby

Conclusion

The sport of pickleball is becoming more and more popular. Many podcasts now cover this fun sport. Pickleball players and fans can learn a lot from these podcasts. They offer tips for players, interviews with experts, and insights into the sport.

Want to get better at pickleball? Or just keep up with what’s new? These podcasts are a great way to do that. They cover everything from game strategies to top player stories. They are for anyone interested in pickleball.

These popular podcasts make pickleball come alive. They share fun stories and tips from the best in the sport. Whether you’re new or experienced, there’s something for you in these shows. They connect you with the pickleball world and other fans.

Looking for reviews, great episodes, or new guests to listen to? These top pickleball podcasts have what you need. They’re perfect for anyone who loves pickleball and wants to learn more. Sit back and enjoy the knowledge and fun they bring.

FAQ

What are some popular pickleball podcasts?

Some popular pickleball podcasts include The McGuffin Show, It Feels Right with Rob & Stone, and more. They’re fun and full of great information for pickleball fans.

What can I expect from The McGuffin Show?

The McGuffin Show is a top pickleball podcast. It brings interesting discussions and tips for players. Hosts Tyson McGuffin and Kyle McKenzie make it fun.

What makes It Feels Right with Rob & Stone special?

It Feels Right with Rob & Stone goes behind the scenes of pro pickleball. It’s hosted by pros Adam Stone and Rob Nunnery. Their insights are loved by many.

Why should MLP fans listen to Inside Major League Pickleball?

Inside Major League Pickleball is all about MLP. Tyson Apostol, Michelle McMahon, and Casey Patterson host it. They share news, tourney updates, and pro insights.

What can I expect from The Pickleball Studio Podcast?

The Pickleball Studio Podcast, by Chris Olson and Will Chaing, shares all about pickleball. It’s easy to listen to. They cover strategy, tourneys, and talk to experts.

What makes Dinking Around with Eddie and Webby different?

Dinking Around with Eddie and Webby is a lively podcast about pickleball. They chat about the game, do reviews, and talk to pickleball stars. It’s great fun.

How can pickleball podcasts benefit players and fans?

Pickleball podcasts give great tips and interviews. Top players and experts share advice. They’re a good way to keep up with the pickleball scene.
